text:
Fabrizio Espindola has announced a new 14-hour video course on creating real-time water effects in Unity.

It covers Shader Graph, HLSL, the Particle System, compute shaders, and C#: https://t.co/aKsYkKTWH7 https://t.co/NQV3Q2QnpI
